Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-27 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum-ranker-long dashboard shows EACO as the dominant performer with a rank of 1 and score of 92.4, displaying extraordinary long-term returns of 1,758% over 10 years and 463% over 5 years while maintaining all four moving averages in bullish alignment. EACO's exceptional outperformance versus SPY is particularly striking at 1,491.89% over 10 years, and its 4-out-of-4 ratio passes indicate consistent acceleration across timeframes, though the 6-month deceleration (ratio of 0.87) suggests a brief pullback within an otherwise sustained uptrend. CLMT ranks second with comparable 5-year returns of 465% but notably weaker 10-year performance at 826%, indicating EACO has demonstrated more durable secular momentum; both securities show strong technical positioning with all SMA conditions met. The momentum signal for EACO registers at 0.53 with a "clean" flag and "strong_buy" classification, while negative correlations across most sector ETFs (particularly XLU at -0.198 and DBA at -0.156) suggest these are uncorrelated growth plays rather than broad market proxies.
